description: Four images in a 2×2 grid with title and individual labels. Blue-black bordered boxes. Suggestion placeholders when images not uploaded.

SUGGESTION_1.description: What to upload for top-left slot
SUGGESTION_1.example: Upload a photo of the server room or data center

SUGGESTION_2.description: What to upload for top-right slot
SUGGESTION_2.example: Upload a photo of the network infrastructure

SUGGESTION_3.description: What to upload for bottom-left slot
SUGGESTION_3.example: Upload a photo of the entry corridor or doorway

SUGGESTION_4.description: What to upload for bottom-right slot
SUGGESTION_4.example: Upload a photo of the loading area or exit point
